channel.title: Prophecy on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Prophecy on Alien Truth Social

item.title: The Seekers: A UFO Religion in Mid-Twentieth Century United States
item.description:
The Seekers, also known as The Brotherhood of the Seven Rays, was a UFO religion founded in 1953 by Charles Laughead in the Midwestern United States. Led by Dorothy Martin, the group believed flying saucers would save them from a predicted catastrophe on December 21, 1954. When the prophecy failed, many members experienced cognitive dissonance, a phenomenon studied by Leon Festinger in his book When Prophecy Fails. The Seekers are considered by some to be the earliest UFO religion.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Seekers_%28rapturists%29

item.title: Chen Tao (UFO religion)
item.description:
Chen Tao, also known as God’s Salvation Church, was a UFO religion founded in Taiwan in 1996 by Hon-Ming Chen. The group relocated to Texas in 1997 and gained notoriety for a failed millennial prophecy. Chen Tao members wore white clothing and cowboy hats, and called their leader “Teacher Chen.” After their prophecy of God’s appearance did not occur, the group largely disbanded, with many members returning to Taiwan.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chen_Tao_%28UFO_religion%29
